user.title: Connect to Elegant LED Controller
user.description: Enter the IP address of your Elegant LED controller.

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect to the controller. Check the IP address and ensure the device is powered on.

data_description.time_sync_enabled: Sync controller clock when it drifts from HA.
data_description.time_sync_threshold: Maximum allowed time drift before syncing (2-60 s).
data_description.poll_enabled: Periodically fetch full state from the controller as a safety net.
data_description.poll_interval: How often to fetch full state (60-86400 s).
data_description.debounce_enabled: After detecting an external change (browser, remote), fetch full state to catch multi-zone changes.
data_description.external_change_debounce: Wait this long after the last external change before fetching (0.1-10.0 s).

reset_zone_defaults.name: Reset zone to defaults
reset_zone_defaults.description: Reset a zone to default settings (white neutral, no effects, full brightness).

set_zone_effects.name: Set zone effects
set_zone_effects.description: Set one or more effects on a zone. Prefer effect_ids when possible; names are not shared across controller types.

zone_index.name: Zone index
zone_index.description: The zone index (0-23) to set effects on.

effects.name: Effects (names)
effects.description: List of effect names resolved via zone's dictionary. Ignored if effect_ids is provided.

effect_ids.name: Effect IDs
effect_ids.description: List of raw effect IDs. Preferred for mixed controller types.

set_zone_roll_effect.name: Set zone roll effect
set_zone_roll_effect.description: Set the rollout effect used by a zone.

zone_index.name: Zone index
zone_index.description: The zone index (0-23) to set the roll effect on.

roll_effect_id.name: Roll effect ID
roll_effect_id.description: The raw roll effect ID for this zone.
